feats_traits: Human Traits: Lucky (reroll 1s once per LR), Insightful (+1 Inspiration per LR)
Feat: Druid Initiate (Guidance, Mending cantrips; Charm Person 1/LR free)
Fighting Style: Two-Weapon Fighting (+DEX to off-hand damage)
Second Wind: 1d10 + Fighter level HP as Bonus Action (1/short or long rest)
Wizard Spellcasting: Spellbook, ritual casting, Arcane Recovery
Bladesong: INT mod uses/LR, +INT AC, +10 ft speed, ADV Acrobatics, INT for attacks, +INT Con saves (conc.)

bladesong.name: Bladesong
bladesong.description: Bonus Action: Activate bladesong for 1 minute (INT mod uses/long rest)

utility: Vial of Emeldir Sand (eat when fire damage)

sessions.Ramil al-Sayif:
Ramil al-Sayif's journey starts here.


Wants the same nomadic life he knows for his family as well.
 Is not settled on man or woman, monoamy or polygamie.
sessions.Two Gods:
Session: Two Gods

Date: 22.02.26

Notes: There is some light above the mural. What we see is 12 armrings on the goddess of life.

Several racne brake into the cave. They are burrowing insekts in the maotains. They follow a queen, mothers are subordineate to the hivemind "mother". There are also worker, archer warrior aracnes.

As chase them of the mother casts a spell that almost kills me and makes me bild and deaf and afraid. A herbal concotrion from madea made with water from the crystal pillars rejuvinates me fully (all spell slots as well).

We cross several rooms and riddles

sargent -> sentry 1
rot -> major 4
schwarz -> capitan 3
ramil -> leutnant 2
grün -> deputy 5
blau -> chief 6


Dont forget, 3 is right and you fill find the light,

Skarsnig and Gumbo are the goblin that was behind us and his riding frog. We are in Tzeentch manor. Inside one room underneat a picture lord grimmrock (with sickle), and one says matriarch Blackthron (no sickle). 
in the dining room the matriarc enters, elegenat black robes, human figure.

Dinner with the Matriarch:
Looks young but is over 240 years old. She is the great great gandmother of madea. She says the blackthorns have a destiny. Balckthorn is the leading family of the grand witch covenant, devaut followers of Tzeetch.

She follows the weaver of ways and his plan?

Nagash is the dark god on the mural.

Grimmrock is the leader of the mortuary cult. The followers of morwath (one of the five faces of the many face god).

The mask of the matriarch is a non concious artefact with some benefits and drawbacks. 
We follow Skarsnig to the office. Golden Book, manuscripts in different language, contracts. The contracts are a confirmation that the mortuary cult delivered something to the witches. SOmething called WF highly volatie. Carthean Family is responisble for the delivery of these Artifacts. The Emissary was called al-Saif (Malekai). 
With the Mask Madea can read the letters. Adeal between the grand witch cov and the morturary cult. Between matriarch and corvus grimmrock: The witches of Grand witch covenant will look for the left eye and left hand of nagash. In exchange the morturary cult gave the World Fragment.
This deal happend around 24 years ago.

The golden Book is a magical artifact. It is devine magic, its very differnet than the items of shak assat. Its a religious textbook for the many faced god with five chapters.

Nurgle, god of life and disease. 
Slaanesh godess of longing and hatered.
Morvath: god of death and memory.
Khorn: god of war and love.
Tzeentch: go of science and lies.

In the ritual room there is a button, that activates a number of crystals. When Madea touches one of the crystals she sees her old home with Abigale in there.

We fly back to Madeas house, Abigale is there along with her father who is hurt and her mother. In the mailbox there are letters for Tom, levina, madea from zure  and philliador from Zhavina al-Fare
s.

Abigale: A garrison from the emperor came an told them to evacuate. The attackers where using magic (from the north).

evinas Raiden uncle is in the senate. The north just stationed the troups near hagendorf and did not want to attack. Someone gave the orer unknown. They gave the orders to their troups that they should not attack civilkians. her sister wanted her to show a declerationof of unified command in school. The declaration tells everyone that the Archamge Zavos Aren was placed in command. This mobilisation is temporary. "Support the defensive opperations". Commander of the firstbrigande was Conrad (old white ster, honerable). Zavos Aren protected this land before, during the last croocked moon. Cartheon name keeps apearing.   

Basically both North and South are consolidating power on single authorities.

Carthons are infamous for black market artefacts.

Desert temple, he stole a world fragment from Eledir .
sessions.World Fragment:
Session: The world Fragment

Date:13.11.25


Notes:
We will leave for Kaldoron tomorrow. Its the newest dawnforged ruins. First ruins we found in the last 500 years. 

Event tonight, midnight menagerie. For students. 6 am equipment, cloths, 6:02 at the docks.

What professor Vitaly told us in class: what are the dawnforged, what are their motivations, how did they become extinct. Dont take things as they seem. Look from a different perpective and
look again. 

Midnight Managery: Common room next to the rooms,drinks food, catlyin, zeluvial and tom are there. 40 people.  

Leona greifenhard beastiology major, cares for familiars. 10 contestants in familiar race -> midnight managerie

Starfall tea -> klar und bewusst beim trinken (research)
Nightowl espresso -> macht sehr wach

Once a week there is a event like the midnight menagery.

Zuluvial brings the evening paper  about blutquell

Blutquell -> trembling of the ground, light fire, loane figure with balck robe
might be a scholar of Atherion. The church has delared the sight unloly.

The city is gone, not coquerd, undone. The dead would not stay fallen. (undead) Very anti magic sentiment. A single child survived, points to the sky. 

Corbus Grimrock, when the name is mentioned the surrounig space becommes dark and we hear voices . We feel unsettled. 
The letters:
3 letters and a proclamation. 

Tom is of the oppinion the that the anti magic proclamation will lead to division.

Orthunk is pro regulation.

Kelaria is the academic name for Dawnforged. The ruin is called Keldaron. We will find
Necra. 
Bone warden, Flesh drudge ect. are what we can expect in the Dungeons. 

We get to the ruins and are left by our teachers, Orthunk makes a fire. 
We go into the dungeon, ivan is with us we are going to the unexplored section 3 in the lower path

Dawnforged leichen unter obelisk. Kelaria waffen dort die zerböselt sind. I take simple iron sword
and cast mending. Obelist hat hyroglyphen. When I touch the sword the floor vanishes and the 
obelisk stays floating. 

We fall into deep darkness, and slide past floating water. We land in chest high water. There is a 
upward standigng sacrophage 

Rows and rows of black clad soldiers. An army marching forward. Bruning lAnds behind them
unstoppable flood of soldiers. This is waht we see when touching the artifact in the sacrophagus.
We have a deep desire to never talk to anyone else about what we saw. We also notice the symbol
on their shoulders, a red fire with a jellow star shaped from and balck at the bottom. 

Back at the school the high priest of the church came to ensure the control of magic at the school.
-> The faceless. He will permanetly reside in the school . Balar, Ossiriant, Phalar and Talath have
delcared independance. We are urged to write a letter to our family. Offensive magic is now forbidden  everywhere.
sessions.The Proclamation:
Session: The University

Date: 27.11.25

Notes:Proclemation - Kill on sight if seen casting Necromancy. Corvus Grimmrock was the Necromancer of Blutquell.

Morning after returning from the dungeon, Madea saw the World Fragment above her Bed. Manu Baba wakes us up and tells us we have a lunch meeting with the research dean. Until eveing we have to decide who will be runner and racer. For the Aerodan Race. 

I Read a bookby  Ergo SZAX outside in the sun next to a tree guy who is the gardener. I get distracted by fighting in the arena.

Madea Blackthorn thries to read a book about the armies of the dawnfoged but it is in old english and cannot be read by her.

We meet with the others of the cals and they tell us to meet them in the tea room. On the way I talk to Duneon who thinks not all of the new students should be here at the university.

We talk about who should be Runner and Racer. Levina becomes the Racer and Madea will be the Runner.  

Lorencraft was dealing with necromancy and was decapitated. She was the head of the sparing class. Tom looks away when talking about the faceless. Mr. Raiden is pushing for indepencance he is related to Levina. Tom pulls me aside and tells me to keep an eye out for the faceless. The curch does not always do waht they say.
sessions.Madeas Secret:
Session: What comes after

Date: 13.01.26

Notes: After Hagendorf, there was a blur for 3 weeks where we did nothing. We "wake up" in a room surrounding the artifact. We free ourselfs from the spell.

Senate appointsfar el eonix is appointed as chanceloor with emergancy executive powers. "It is with great reluctance that I agree to this calling" He is taking all the power. 
First order grand army of the republic -> All soldiers assemble in Udun (Galen) 
Mobilize against the north. The village of hagendorf was destroyed. Hallow anwesen is fought over
Landrot holds, Grimmfels too, Nurnen is besiged. 
He calls to join the army. Tom and Zulliviel seem to be enchanted too.

We have artifactology class:
Artifacts are created with the help of Starcrystals . 
Most of them are made from the Dawnforged . 
Making a powerfull artifacts needs percice methods that have partly been forgotten. There are concious artefacts and unconcious artifacts that dont act out  a will. 
Harmfull-Non harmfull artifacts. Harmfull concious artifacts -> cursed and are only allowed to be handeled with special permissions.

The enire castle of the university is an artifact. Concious or conciuos is still not clear. 
Artifacts are created by masters (artifact is the servant) and the created conciosness serves the will of the master.

Powefull artefacts need to be split up into several ertefacts. It amplifies the capacity. This was only done by the dawnfordged. Now they where able to chain 3 artifacts. More than2 artifact chains have a controling arifacts.

2OG after clas, a room apears next to Philliador. It exudes a comforting warmth.
Round room with an old eldaher table. Its very old and used. But still very perstine. The eldaher was a single massive tree that was felled a long time ago. 4 candels on a candalier  (one new, one completely burned down, two inbetween) They are buring but the wax is not meltig. One windo. One old Bookcase. Chest next to the Bookcase (open with key). The key opens all doors.
When the fire is stoked, it talks by placing embers in a font.
The room is both part of the castle and not -> inbetween. We are the only ones that can come in.
We get a bag of holding that connects to the chest in the room.
Madea is the source of the red glow on the artifact. The fire place says it is theoretically possible for people an artifacts link, but not known.
When trying to identify the arfifact it curesd me. For the rest of the game im cursed and am weak to hol damage. I touch madea, cast identify and get cursed again. Im vaunerable  to cold damage.
Madeas heart is the second world fragment. It is in the form of a heart. Its the reason why she is alive. Part of the magic courses through her. I see scars from a surgery. There are 12 world fragments.

Azure Brandson:In 2 weeks the first race, in 3 weaks exams and "christmas". To prepare we are riding aerodons for the first time. We get to the breeding spots. Aerodons are open and kind hearted. They are life long companions. Look into their eyes and get close, and touch heads. Pet it and if he allows it you can get the first ride.

I bond with an albino Aerodon and  name him Tarron.
sessions.Hagendorf:
Session: A new Dawn

Date: 09.12.25

Notes:
Ivan wakes us up, tells us we are expected to to to the faceless cermon. We see religious imagery,
a deciple on his knees being offerd an apple by a luminecent arm . Simple altar with a religiuos book. Golden sun on a black background (Dark Souls). First row: The Dean, ohther people we dont know.

Faceless: We reach for certaintly, when we are feared. If what you study begins to wound rather than wonder -> You should talk to him.
 
Kitaly: Going to the great Pillers. The role of Wizzards is to help Society. Whatever your abilities are.

"You do not go without me" -> Eldalie

Magic is created through emotion. It connects to the big weave. It is in its raw from when it comes out of the weave. For that we use the maigc from the crystals. Small fragments can store this ordered form of magic.

We go up the stairs to the base of the crystal. The crytal absorbs spells that touch it. When touching the crystal with identify I can see that it stores around 28000 spells.

We towards Hagendorf. It is a trading village, with two bridges. A couple hundred peaolpe live here.

As we argue in the town square, one man gets hit by a chromatic orb out of nowhere. The vilage is being attacked by soldiers in chainmail. One commander with a Zweihänder kills regina. Everyone that does not mak it to the tavern trapdoor is dying.
Gimmfeld, Alndrot, Hallow Anwesen were attacked that evening.We where rescued by Kitalys airship. Duneon and Amber are dead.

We are gathered and honered in the great hall. We feel numb, and Tom performs together with his choir.

The world Fragment appears to Levina. It allows her to gain back memories that have been manipulated -> Duneon was a corpse, reanimated and manipulated by someone.
sessions.The great Jh'Zagho:
Session: Two who are different

Date: 25.01.26

Notes:
Emotions connect you to the waeve.
Aritfacts of Nagash harmfull concious. (Left Eye and Hand as we learn later) 

Book of curses written by azure Brandson. He told me that I could potentially get wrid of the curse if I have a big enough star crystal and some help.

I took Tom to the in between to pull the leaver. Philiador gets inerogated 

For ein paar Jahren gab es einen Twin Moon.

There was a woman in the medical wing with gray skin. The woman with the infliction was operated on, the dean mentioned someone (er) and that it should not happen agian like 27 Years go.

Catlyn has been in the morge for more than a year and has a corrupted starcrystal in her neck. Jh`Zargo has had his surgeon notes stolen by someone. He can also cure curses. 

He was in Emeldir and treated  my sister from a curse and talked to my uncle about artifacts. He took notes and those notes have been stolen. Professor Citaly was the only one with access. Besides the head office.  

We follow the scibblings in the poetry of madness to a cave near Rabenhall. We stop for the night at Madeas old House.

We find the cave and inside there is a mural, depicing a some sort of battle between gods.
sessions.Return to Atherion:
Session: Return to Atherion

Date: 11.03.26

Notes: The mages of the northern army have chained eldrich blasts that the grand army cannot deal with. Battle mages that cast Firestorms. The northern Armys will use the grand caves of Talimar and the mountain roads of lomin to hget further into the south.

Archmage Zavos saved the contry from the croocked moon.

Announcement of the Dean Amonius: Two letters 1) From archmage and the king.
Both want Aetherion to abandon its neutrality and join their site. 300 Years ago an emporer was assisted, never since. Yet the fields are burning, and we must act. New policy: go into the lands at war to protect and assist the helpless. We will bear the mark of Aetherion and both sides know about this. If we are attacked we have every right to defend ourselfs. But senseless violence will not be permitted. Should any student be found guilty, the punishment is death. Ordenary curriculum will be replace with defence calsses.

Magistrate: the class structure is changed. We have to go to dean Azure Brandson. 

Philiador got a letter from the Carthien, he wont talk about it.

4 armies that are attacking.

Memory images -> Is like a camera but for moments. Discovered during the unification wars. Takes years to master. We should relive certainmoments in the unification war.  Next to the dorms above the main hall. In there is an art gallery. There are memory images there.
I make a promise to Philiador to reveal his identity only if nescessary. The first image is of people praying to Nurgle. The second is of a battlefield with a dragon. I enter with a corrupted star crystal. I can move in the memory which is not normal, at the end I try to cast Firebolt at the dragon adn explode out of the memory uncociuos and burnt. I get a vial of Emeldir Sand from Jh'Zargo.

Madea enters a gathering of whiches memory. They are sacrificing someone in a stone circle.

Battle of Ossirant Memory, Kai enters and is a battle mage on a horse (Hes a dwarf Dwarf). Ziluvial wants to Fight against the army of the North . 
Jh'Zahrgo got wrid of my curses by using a corrupted Starcystal on my open brain, making me see a visualization the curses and destroy them. He also told me that my uncle had a house in Orodreth. I asked ybout Jenny, the girl that had the sickness (grey skin)  when I first saw Jh'Zhargo. She was hanged for necromancy last week. He cannot say more about it. 

Jh*Zahrgo says that use of starcystal use can lead to a loss of character and emption -> is this the trance?

characters.Magistrate Olgorn:
Appearance : Corpal deamon with tiny wings and broad toothy grin.

Role: Representative of the Senate within the university. He will handle 
administrative issues for us.

Interactions: Introduced us to the University and its rules. Brought us to the
main gate.
characters.Rusty Pete:
Appearance: Hippo folk, broad an with
two "guns" at his side. 
Wears a Barret.

Role: Capitan of an airship to ferry
students from the edge of anfauglith 
to the university.

Interactions: Ferried us accoss the sky
for our fst time. Told us about how the
dragons will attack people with food.
I asked about the magic of flying ship,
but he did not seem deeply knowleged.
characters.[P] Madea Blackthorn:
Appearanc: Short human, long black
hair and gloves, back ensamble outfit.

Role: Student at the university after
taking someones place (Menzel) that
died in the massacer of Blutquell.
Her mother was known by some of the
professors. She might have even tought
herself.

Interactions:
[Day 1,2]: She seemed flusterd at the 
admission and  talked to the magistrate
in a frantich hush. In a short interaction
she seemend burdoned by her inate magic
When she was asked by the professor
about why she came to the uni she said
to unserstand inate magic.
[Day 3]: She was very in favour of the anti magic regualtions, arguing that magic cannot be left
uncontrolled.
characters.[P] Kai Hyoshin:
Appearance : Elf with long arms and 
black hair. Pearlchain around his neck.

Seems more chill after reading the letter .  Wants to join the elemental sparring League .
characters.[P] levina Raiden:
Appearance: Light blue skin, slightly
translucent, dark blue hair. Is an 
airgenazi made out of wind. Necklace 
with tear drop gem, leafs in the hair.

Role: Bubbly personality .

Interactions :
characters.[P] Philiador LeBlanc:
When he attempts to cast spells wierd things happen. He is shy and suspicios. Wants to join the experimental fireball club.

Arian  Carthi is his real name.
characters.Tom Dyke:
Ice man from the north. Pretty reasonable guy seems friendly and energetic. Is pro magic becouse
he comes from the north, won a tournament against 40 people to get into the univeristy.

Thinks the church proclamation will lead to devision.

Will join the harmonics club.
characters.Catlyn Duneon: Cocky, but clearly involved in the Blutquell incidnet. Turned out  to be a reanimated corpse manipulated by someone.
characters.Ziluvial Orthon: Pro regulation when the church proclamation was anounced.
characters.Azure Brandson: Research Dean, seems freindly. Knows a little bit of waht we are up to. Knew Madeas mother from studiyng together.
characters.Jeany Wright: Has 6 arms and looks like an air elmental her eyes are always hidden. She is one of the boat captins. Brought us to the first Dungeon.
characters.Corvus Grimmrock: Was responsible for the massacre at Blutquell. When his name is mentioned the room becomes cold and  dark  and you hear whispers.
characters.The Faceless: Ahighpriest of the church ,  is placed at the university to watch overthings from the church side.
characters.Manu BaBa: Aperson wearing a mask and loose desert clothing.
characters.John skeeter cleadeus bane: Herbalist in the  her b kitchen  in the third floor.
characters.Branco: Librarian     has a huge book and  writes things in it. I s very tall.
characters.Zahiva al-Fares: Artifactoligy teacher . Told us about  linking artefacts .
characters.Skarsnig: Goblin Type  servant, rides on his Frog Gumbo.  Follower of Tzneetsch, servant of the Mtriarch insode Tzneetsches manor. Has an hourly alotment of cheese.

places.Blutquell: Origin of the worst desaster in recent history. Brought by a former student of the University. He performed Necromancy and Fire magic. A single child survived and pointed to the sky.
places.Kel Daron:
We touched an obelisk and it sent us downward falling into darkness and flaoting water. At the 
bottom there was a sacrophagus in chains. We broke the chains and found the world shard. Phil
touched it and we had a vison of blackcad soldiersmarching and bringing destruction. We where 
found 3 days later but for us only a few hours passed.
places.The great Pillars: Next to Hagendorf (as we look out towards  the pillars, Hagendorf is half an hour behinds us.  They grow pecouse under Landrot is a massive dawnforged city. Cannals where used to tranport and  push out  the crystals.  Magical resin is washout out from the Crystal into the rivers. The river has  an iridecent  surface. The river has a magic that is like a melody.
